revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-6-110

Alternative term: Sliding shutter slip-form

Formwork used in the construction of tall walls, towers, concrete roads, etc. which is moved either continuously or in regular small movements as concreting proceeds.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Sliding form}}
